### 3. Git Commit
```bash
git add docs/
git add AutoGenerated/
git add AUTOGENERATED_AUDIT_V24_1.md CLEANUP_SUMMARY.md
git commit -m "v24.1: Clean up AutoGenerated folder - move historical docs, archive legacy validation files

- Moved 26 files + 210+ subdirectory files to docs/
- Deleted 1 malformed file
- Organized into: docs/historical/v16_2/, docs/gemini_sessions/, docs/validation_archives/
- Remaining: 20 active files + 4 directories (57% reduction in top-level files)
- See AUTOGENERATED_AUDIT_V24_1.md for full audit details"
```
